headline: EU Antitrust Complaint Puts Broadcom VMware Licensing Strategy Under Spotlight
summary: European cloud providers, through trade group CISPE, have filed a formal antitrust complaint with the European Commission against Broadcom over VMware licensing changes. The complaint focuses on the termination of the VMware Cloud Service Provider program and revised contractual terms that CISPE says raise costs and restrict access. The case targets Broadcom's conduct in Europe, where VMware is a core part of many cloud infrastructure offerings. Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO), trading at $310.51,...
